data.title: Kamala Harris Turns 60 — Gets Birthday Greetings From Obama, Biden And Even Donald Trump: Republican Opponent Says, 'I Think I'd Get Her Some Flowers'
data.description: Presidents Obama, Bidena and Trump wished Kamala Harris on her 60th birthday on Oct. 20, 2024.

data.title: Jeff Bezos-Backed Perplexity Aims For $8B Valuation In New Funding Round: AI-Fueled Google Challenger Reportedly Seeks $500M For Growth
data.description: Perplexity, an artificial intelligence startup, is in discussions to raise its valuation to $8 billion or higher in its latest funding round, a significant increase from its previous valuation of $3 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin On The Rise As 'Uptober' May Be Finally Here: Analysts Predict Bullish Breakout For King Crypto, ETH's Rally To $3,300
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies maintained bullish momentum over the weekend, boosting expectations for new all-time highs.

data.title: Bernie Sanders Says Grew Up In A Family That Lived Paycheck-To-Paycheck, Slams Inequality: 'It's The Reason That Working People Live Shorter Lives Than The Rich'
data.description: Bernie Sanders highlighted how economic struggles and living paycheck to paycheck reduce life expectancy for working-class families compared to the rich

data.title: Australian Cannabis Producer Little Green Pharma Reports Record Revenue, 80% Increase In European Sales QoQ
